body.title: Build weather.html — dark kiosk dashboard, CSV parsing, PWA, music intents
body.result: weather.html built — dark theme, outdoor big card + indoor 2-col grid, auto-refresh 60s, PWA, music links; hub listener live on port 80; DNS ready; hub needs router DNS → 10.0.0.229 to connect
body.intention: I intend that weather.html is a self-contained dashboard that fetches its sibling weather.csv, displays current conditions per sensor in large readable text, and is installable as an Android PWA.
body.description:
Single HTML file. Derives CSV URL from window.location (same base, .html→.csv). Fetches and parses CSV via JS fetch + manual parse (no library). Shows latest reading per sensor_id.

UI: design TBD with Akien — ticket is ready to sprint once UI design is confirmed in conversation. Known constraints: dark background (#000), monospace, large text for wall-mounted phones, graceful -- for missing values, auto-refresh every 60s.

Android music app intent anchors at bottom: Pandora, YouTube Music, Amazon Music (Android intent:// URLs).

PWA: inline manifest via <link rel=manifest href=data:...> so no separate file needed; service worker via Blob URL for offline support.

**Affected files:** acurite-free/weather.html
**Design rules:** vanilla JS only; no frameworks; no external CDN dependencies (must work offline); single file
**Scope boundary:** IN — dashboard, CSV parsing, PWA, music intents. OUT — history charts (future), multi-station aggregation (future).
**Completion criteria:** weather.html opens from a file:// URL and displays data from a local weather.csv; Add to Home Screen works on Android; music intent links are present.
